name: Tegucigalpa (Honduras)

colors.symbolism: elements of the coat of arms

description: A flag of the Capital Central District of Tegucigalpa, Honduras, bearing the city's coat of arms on a blue and white field.
history: Tegucigalpa is the capital of Honduras, forming with Comayaguela the Central District (Distrito Central). The city's flag bears its coat of arms.

features.symbolism: Tegucigalpa city flag with coat of arms
